holdings.infoBox: QCLN is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 11.24%, ON Semiconductor at 11.08%, Monolithic Power Systems at 8.17%, First Solar at 7.15%, and Tesla at 6.26%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Clean Edge Green Energy Index Fund (QCLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Clean Edge Green Energy index, a market-cap-weighted index of US-listed firms involved in clean energy. QCLN was launched on Feb 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
